notes: This text describes Mamnoon Fine Foods retail/grocery products (mezzes, wraps, packaged goods) sold at grocery stores and coffee shops — not the sit-down restaurant menu. No prices are listed for any item. Beverage data absent.

dishes.name: Hummus
dishes.description: Traditional Beiruti Lebanese hummus with a clean balance between citrus and tahini, fresh garlic, light and creamy texture.

dishes.name: Harra Hummus
dishes.description: Traditional hummus blended with harra hot sauce made from fermented Fresno chiles; clean, mild heat cutting through creamy fresh hummus.

dishes.name: Baba Ganoush
dishes.description: Smoky eggplants blended into a custardy vegan dip with umami-forward flavor and fresh finish.

dishes.name: Muhammara
dishes.description: Red pepper paste and walnut dip with pomegranate molasses for tangy sweetness and rich depth.

dishes.name: Mama Chips
dishes.description: Crispy, slightly thicker pita chips baked from fresh in-house pita bread made from a blend of white and wheat dough; delightfully salted.

dishes.name: Harra Hot Sauce
dishes.description: Fresno chile-based hot sauce with slightly smoky and fruity flavor; cumin adds dusky notes. Fan favorite at all Mamnoon restaurants.

dishes.name: Za'atar
dishes.description: Chef-curated woodsy and tangy za'atar spice blend imported fresh from Lebanon.

dishes.name: Falafel Wrap
dishes.description: Hearty wrap in homemade wheat pita with crispy falafel, kale, pickled cauliflower, za'atar roasted tofu, and tarrator sauce.

dishes.name: Halloumi Cheese Wrap
dishes.description: Fried halloumi cheese, quinoa tabbouleh, pickled cabbage, and roasted garlic tahini wrapped in homemade pita.

dishes.name: Sausage & Egg Kuku Wrap
dishes.description: Persian herby omelette (kuku) made with yogurt, parsley, cilantro, green onion, and dill; topped with spiced lamb sujuk sausage patty, cheese blend, pickled banana peppers, and garlic yogurt in fresh pita.

dishes.name: Veggie & Egg Kuku Wrap
dishes.description: Vegetarian kuku wrap with Persian herby omelette, kale, fried onions, pickled cabbage, kashkaval and mozzarella cheese blend, and harra hot sauce in fresh pita.

dishes.name: Shish Chicken Wrap
dishes.description: Yogurt-marinated chicken with harra hot sauce, caramelized onion labneh, kale salad, and pickled veggies in fresh pita. Served hot or cold.
